mapper.select: SELECT bucket AS time, ROUND(AVG(total_current_a)::numeric, 1) AS total_current_a, ROUND(AVG(total_current_b)::numeric, 1) AS total_current_b, ROUND(AVG(total_current_c)::numeric, 1) AS total_current_c, ROUND(AVG(breaker_rating)::numeric, 1) AS breaker_rating, ROUND(AVG(voltage)::numeric, 1) AS voltage, ROUND(AVG(total_power)::numeric, 0) AS total_power, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(load_current), 0)::numeric, 1) AS load_current, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(total_charging_current), 0)::numeric, 1) AS total_charging_current FROM ( SELECT time_bucket(CAST(#{bucketInterval} AS interval), h.time) AS bucket, h.total_current_a, h.total_current_b, h.total_current_c, h.breaker_rating, h.voltage, h.total_power, h.load_current, h.total_charging_current FROM nc_dlm_history h WHERE h.device_sn = #{deviceSn} AND h.time >= #{since} ) t GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
